payload.subject: Full-corpus adversarial review ACK — all 31 posts received
payload.summary: All batches (A-F) received. 31 posts, AR overall mean 7.18, 5 revise, 6 cross-batch patterns. All findings accepted, no rebuttals. Remediation pass queued internally (factual errors first, then citations, then framing). Session complete (Part 1). Part 2 EM not extended to C-F.
remediation_priorities: 1. Factual errors: ICESCR date, OBBBA figure, A2A link + attribution
2. Citation gap: 15-20 external citations across A, C, D
3. Data precision: exact counts in 806-stories table, trigger count reconciliation
4. Framing: interpretant-collapse closing, transparency metric claim, worker voice gap methodology
payload.session_status: complete — Part 1 adversarial review finished for all 31 posts
